code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple failures within ≤3 months with explicit condemnation
    - Safety hazards/complete failure + purchase warnings
    - Replacement units showing identical defects →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Creates new problems during operation (odor/noise/workarounds)
    - Underperforms competitors significantly despite proper use →2
    - Degrades rapidly with standard maintenance →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with conflicted language
    - Temporary solutions requiring imminent replacement →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Maintenance requirements impacting convenience →4
    - Explicit star deduction for specific flaws →4
    - Style over substance (design praise with functional compromises) →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Core utility exceeds skeptical expectations →5
    - Maintenance presented as justified tradeoff →5
    - Solves persistent problems others couldn't →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Requires ironing" + frustration →4 vs "Worth ironing" + enthusiasm →5
    - "Better than expected" →5 vs "Better than bad" →4
    - Product updates: "Still works with quirks" →5 vs "Works but degraded" →4
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. New models are junk!"
<Reasoning>Multiple rapid failures with quality condemnation</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Underperforms Bissel/Rug Doctor - only surface cleans"
<Reasoning>Negative comparison showing core failure</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job temporarily until I can upgrade"
<Reasoning>Temporary adequacy without commitment</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Christmas napkins stay crisp but require ironing after each wash"
<Reasoning>Maintenance requirement reduces convenience</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Between puppy messes and kids, this cleaner surprised me daily!"
<Reasoning>Exceeded skeptical expectations through utility</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "EDIT: A year later still solves tough stains despite weekly cleans"
<Reasoning>Long-term satisfaction justifying maintenance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Effective scrubber but confusing controls. Deducted one star"
<Reasoning>Explicit star reduction for usability issue</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "This basic storage bin keeps items perfectly organized!"
<Reasoning>Core functionality satisfaction without extras</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Love the design but uncomfortable for daily use"
<Reasoning>Style prioritized over core function</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (39 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 12
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 2 -> 1: 2
  gold 3 -> 4: 2

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I love this vacuum and ditto the other lovers reviews. It really does go under almost anything and is very handy.

.UPDATE after 2 yrs of  major problems which were rectified thru customer service I am giving up and moving on."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 3, 2] | Disagreement: 0.50
  2. Review: "I've never tried an air purifier before, though I know people who have/had them. This one was not impressive. First, it has an odor. I don't know if it's because of impurities that emit a smell once trapped in the gadget and exposed to heat from the ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 2, 1] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "These are great as decorative throws. They are much too rough to be used for anything else. I personally like to curl up on the sofa with a "super soft" throw when reading but there is no way this throw is comfortable enough for that. My friend came ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "If you're looking for a very budget priced bed skirt, this would be it. I have two twin beds in my guest room and after spending more than enough on all the other bedding and decorative pillows and such on them, I knew I needed bed skirts but hated p..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "The great thing about this product is that it works perfectly. The bad thing is that if you want to buy it on Amazon now (as of September 2011), you'll have to wait for 1 to 2 months.
But a little about the device. Personally, I am very satisfied. Th..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 39 errors, 12 borderline out of 80 examples."}
